_meta.description: Set comparison DB. setScore (0-100) computed live, NOT hand-typed. setScore = ipStrength*0.5 + liveDemand*0.3 + pricePerf*0.2. Letter tier is an OUTPUT bucket of setScore, never an input.
_meta.ipStrength: Data-derived IP Strength Index per anchor character (0-100): historical sustained retail-multiple of that character's prior sets + chase-single sold velocity. Charizard high (past sets held 3x+); Zygarde low (faded to retail). Refresh as sets mature.
_meta.liveDemand: From live signals: hype-keyword net + 90d eBay sold-volume tier, scaled 0-100.

Prismatic Evolutions.note: Benchmark — held 2.9x through repeated reprints 17mo. No ceiling found.

Paldean Fates.note: OOP shiny set, display 5.3x. OOP appreciation curve.

Destined Rivals.note: Reprint cycle active; display $250 to $600. Dip is buy window.

Ascended Heroes.note: Specialty-only (no booster box). Supply-constrained = higher floor.

Mega Evolution.note: ME01, first set in the series; second-strongest IP behind Ascended Heroes. First-in-line scarcity.

Journey Together.note: Mid set, trainer-gallery driven. Cooler than AH/PE.

Chaos Rising.note: ME04, lower-IP anchor. Secondary caps near retail.

Perfect Order.note: ME03, weakest ME IP. Near-retail secondary.
